---
title: "Josh Copeland - ECOM90002 - Tutorial 1"
output: html_document
date: ""
---

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)

theme_set(theme_minimal())
```



# Question 1

```{r q1}

data <- read_csv("ChocVsNobels-1.csv")


ggplot(data, aes(ChocPerCap)) + geom_histogram()




model <- lm(Nobels ~ ChocPerCap, data = data)

summary(model)

```
